name: 1 GW Alkaline Electrolyser Plant
description: Reference 1 GW alkaline electrolyser with associated balance-of-plant. Based on ~80% capacity factor, ~50 kWh/kg specific energy consumption.
caveats: Covers electrolyser plant staffing only. Ammonia synthesis, storage, transport, and dedicated RE generation workforce not included.

coefficients.notes: Allocated from IRENA aggregate using H2 relevance weights. Pressure-vessel, piping, and structural welding during build.
Allocated from IRENA aggregate using H2 relevance weights. Extensive piping for demin water, cooling, H2 gas, and KOH electrolyte.
Allocated from IRENA aggregate using H2 relevance weights. HV/LV cabling, rectifier connections, transformer installation.
Allocated from IRENA aggregate using H2 relevance weights. Foundations, buildings, roads, and civil works.
Allocated from IRENA aggregate using H2 relevance weights. Steel structures, pipe racks, and equipment support frames.

name: 500 MW PEM Electrolyser Plant
description: Reference 500 MW PEM electrolyser with balance-of-plant. Based on ~80% capacity factor, ~45 kWh/kg specific energy consumption. PEM technology uses solid polymer membrane, requiring more electronics/precision assembly but less heavy welding than alkaline.
caveats: Covers electrolyser plant staffing only. Dedicated RE generation, ammonia synthesis, storage, and transport workforce not included. PEM-specific coefficients are directional estimates; no per-occupation published data exists for PEM specifically.

coefficients.notes: PEM stack assembly is electronics-intensive. Higher share than alkaline due to membrane electrode assembly work.
HV/LV cabling, rectifier connections. Higher share than alkaline due to more complex power electronics.
Less welding than alkaline � smaller footprint, less high-pressure pipework.
Demin water, cooling, H2 gas piping. Less extensive than alkaline (no KOH electrolyte circuit).
PEM stack mounting, skid assembly, precision mechanical installation.
Foundations, buildings, roads. Smaller footprint than alkaline 1 GW.
Steel structures and equipment support frames. Reduced vs alkaline due to compact design.

coefficients.nco_group_title: Metal Working Machine Tool Setters and Operators
coefficients.notes: On-site fabrication and forming of structural and piping components.
E&I installation supervision, power electronics testing, loop checking.

coefficients.nco_group_title: Chemical Products Plant and Machine Operators
coefficients.notes: Pre-commissioning support and early operator training.

coefficients.nco_group_title: Incinerator and Water Treatment Plant Operators
coefficients.notes: BOP utilities equipment installation.
Construction-phase HSE oversight.
Process engineering and vendor oversight for PEM-specific systems.
Project directors and senior leadership.
Construction managers and area leads.

coefficients.notes: Environmental monitoring and EIA compliance.
Construction supervision and quality control.
Electrical system commissioning, power electronics validation, protection relay testing.
Process commissioning leadership, membrane conditioning, performance guarantee testing.
DCS/SCADA commissioning and control loop verification.

coefficients.notes: Process start-up, electrolyser conditioning, performance testing.
Stack electrical connections verification and final assembly QC.

coefficients.notes: Water treatment commissioning and BOP system start-up.
Punch-list completion and tie-in welding.
Line flushing, pressure testing, and leak rectification.
Water chemistry validation and analytical method proving.
Commissioning-phase HSE oversight.
Commissioning management and handover coordination.
E&I maintenance, power electronics upkeep, instrument calibration. Highest ops share due to PEM electronics intensity.

coefficients.notes: Water treatment, gas purification, and BOP operators.

coefficients.notes: Preventive and corrective maintenance of compressors, pumps, and rotating equipment.
DCS/SCADA control room operators on shift rotation.
Laboratory analysts, water chemistry monitoring, and quality control.
Process optimization, membrane degradation tracking, efficiency improvement.
Ongoing plant HSE and permit-to-work management.
Maintenance welding for piping repairs.
Plant director and department heads.
Operations and maintenance managers.

name: 1 MTPA Green Ammonia Synthesis Plant
description: Reference 1 million tonne per annum green ammonia synthesis plant (Haber-Bosch + ASU + H2 compression + cryogenic storage). Consumes ~0.18 MT H2/year as feedstock. Based on conventional Indian ammonia plant benchmarks scaled for green H2 input.
caveats: Does NOT include electrolyser or RE generation workforce � those are separate archetypes. Coefficients derived from conventional Indian ammonia plant benchmarks (IFFCO, NFL, RCF); no published green ammonia plant staffing data exists. India labor intensity multiplier (1.3-1.5x IRENA global) applied.

coefficients.notes: Pressure-vessel welding dominant. HP reactor vessels, heat exchangers, and piping for 150-300 bar operating pressure.
Extensive high-pressure piping for H2 feed, NH3 synthesis loop, refrigeration, and utilities.
Steel structures, pipe racks, reactor support frames, and equipment foundations.
Heavy rigging, reactor installation, compressor trains, and rotating equipment.
HV/LV cabling, motor connections, transformer and substation installation.
Foundations, blast-resistant control rooms, roads, and civil works for chemical plant.

coefficients.nco_group_title: Metal Working Machine Tool Setters and Operators
coefficients.notes: On-site fabrication, cutting, and forming of structural and piping components.
Electrical panel building, instrumentation, and control system installation.
E&I installation supervision and loop checking.

coefficients.nco_group_title: Chemical Products Plant and Machine Operators
coefficients.notes: Pre-commissioning support, catalyst handling training.

coefficients.nco_group_title: Incinerator and Water Treatment Plant Operators
coefficients.notes: Cooling water, steam, and waste treatment system installation.
Construction-phase HSE oversight. Higher than electrolyser due to chemical plant hazards.
Process engineering, vendor oversight, HAZOP studies, and design verification.
Project directors, site managers, and senior leadership.
Construction managers and area leads.

coefficients.nco_group_title: Environmental and Occupational Health Inspectors and Associates
coefficients.notes: Environmental monitoring and EIA compliance for chemical plant.
Construction supervision and quality control.
Catalyst loading, reactor conditioning, performance guarantee testing. Critical phase for ammonia synthesis.

name: 2 GW Hybrid Solar+Wind Farm (Dedicated RE)
description: Dedicated renewable energy farm (~1.5 GW solar PV + ~0.7 GW onshore wind) sized to serve one 1 GW electrolyser. Based on MNRE Green Hydrogen Standard additionality requirements. ~4.5 TWh/year at blended ~25% capacity factor.
caveats: RE coefficients are the highest-confidence numbers in this dataset (IRENA/CEEW India-specific, multi-year data). This archetype covers the LARGEST construction-phase headcount driver. Does not include battery storage or grid interconnection workforce.

coefficients.notes: Cable laying, panel wiring, inverter connections. Dominant construction workforce for solar+wind.
Trenching, panel mounting, foundation earthworks. Highest semi-skilled labor share.
Wind tower erection, solar mounting structures, substation steelwork.
Structural welding for wind towers and mounting frames.
Inverter installation, transformer assembly, SCADA panel building.
Wind turbine nacelle and rotor assembly, tracker mechanism installation.

coefficients.nco_group_title: Crane, Hoist and Related Plant Operators
coefficients.notes: Wind turbine tower and nacelle lifting. Specialized heavy crane operation.
Cable conduit installation, cooling systems, foundation drainage.
Civil works, road construction, HV substation foundations.
HV testing, inverter commissioning, SCADA setup.

coefficients.nco_group_title: Metal Working Machine Tool Setters and Operators
coefficients.notes: On-site fabrication of mounting structures and cable trays.
Construction-phase HSE oversight for large distributed site.
Project directors, site managers, and senior leadership.

coefficients.nco_group_title: Environmental and Occupational Health Inspectors and Associates
coefficients.notes: Environmental monitoring, land use compliance, wildlife impact.
Construction managers and area leads.
Construction supervision and quality control across distributed site.
Electrical maintenance, inverter servicing, cable repair across distributed site.

coefficients.nco_group_title: Agricultural and Industrial Machinery Mechanics and Repairers
coefficients.notes: Wind turbine mechanical maintenance, gearbox servicing, blade inspection.
Solar panel cleaning crews. Labor-intensive in dusty Rajasthan/Gujarat conditions.
SCADA monitoring, performance analysis, inverter diagnostics.
Ongoing site HSE, high-altitude work permits for wind maintenance.
RE performance optimization and grid compliance engineering.
Site director and department heads.
O&M managers.
Shift supervisors for maintenance crews.

coefficients.nco_group_title: Environmental and Occupational Health Inspectors and Associates
coefficients.notes: Ongoing environmental compliance and wildlife monitoring.
